summary: iter182 + iter183 backend + frontend testing. Backend: 8/8 PASS (iter183 feed validation media-only/text-only/empty/whitespace + iter182 auto-photo size<512B, size>12MB, quota 429 with default 3 credits, unauth 401). Frontend iter183 (optimistic UI): 3/3 phases PASS — publish disabled w/ FR title 'Ajoute du texte, une photo ou une vidéo' when empty; enabled instantly on text; click Publier → temp post appears in ~75ms with badge '⏳ Envoi en cours…' data-testid=post-temp_xxx-uploading, composer cleared instantly, badge disappears after API resolution. Frontend iter182 (AIImageModal auto-photo tab): couldn't reach via Marketplace→CreateProduct nav in Playwright (create-product trigger not discoverable in current marketplace landing), but code review confirms all required elements present in ServicesPage.js (tab default='autophoto' L929; ai-tab-{autophoto,generate,enhance,bgswap} L1116-1119; ai-pane-autophoto L1123 with '4 crédits' banner L1128; ai-autophoto-file input L1131; ai-autophoto-run button L1231; setAutoVariations(null) on file change clears results L1132).
action_items: (Optional, out of iter182 scope) Unable to locate a top-level 'Create Product' CTA on /marketplace from Bob's non-vendor account via Playwright — main agent can confirm the navigation path (likely gated behind 'Vendor' toggle or dashboard route). iter181 testing reached it successfully, so the flow exists; this is only a Playwright discoverability note.
(Optional polish, carry-over from iter181) ai-quota label '0/33 restantes' ambiguity — add separator between used/quota and remaining badges.
critical_code_review_comments: ServicesPage.js now 1275 lines — past the 700-line soft guideline; AIImageModal (~928-1275, 347 lines) is an even stronger candidate for extraction into /components/marketplace/AIImageModal.js.
auto-photo endpoint correctly charges quota ONLY on successes (marketplace.py L679-684) and caps presets at 6 (L652). Clean fan-out with asyncio.gather.
iter183 validation logic (feed.py L207-212) correctly checks (has_text OR has_media) and returns FR error.
Optimistic UI (FeedPage.js handlePost): temp_id prefix + uploading badge + composer reset BEFORE fetch. Measured 75ms — excellent UX, well under 500ms target.
Auto-photo disable 503 check happens AFTER size validation (ordering OK for DoS protection: reject oversize first before checking settings DB).
All required data-testids present for iter182 + iter183 (ai-tab-*, ai-pane-*, ai-autophoto-*, publish-button, post-{id}-uploading, create-post).

success_rate.frontend: iter183 100% (3/3 phases); iter182 UI not reached via Playwright (code review only)

seed_data_creation: 2 real feed posts created by Bob during testing: 'TEST iter183 optimistic UI hello' + 'TEST_iter183 text-only <uuid>' + 1 media-only post '/uploads/test_iter183.jpg'. No Gemini credits consumed — auto-photo quota gate correctly blocked at 429 without calling the generation pipeline.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter182+iter183 backend fully regressed via /app/backend/tests/test_iter182_183.py (run with -p no:pytest_ethereum to bypass web3 plugin ImportError unrelated to project). iter183 optimistic UI confirmed in live E2E — 75ms from click to visible temp post. For iter182 AIImageModal UI reach: previous iter181 used `page.get_by_testid('marketplace-create-product-btn')` — if that route still exists it's the fastest path. Bob's default quota is 3/day: any auto-photo test WILL 429 (intentional design — needs 4 credits). To actually generate, bump quota to >=4 via settings (`mkt_ai_default_daily_quota>=4`) or DELETE from marketplace_ai_image_usage + raise quota. Do NOT trigger unless necessary (4 Gemini credits + ~80s wait).
rca of the issue: N/A — all tested paths pass. iter182 and iter183 implementations are correct per spec.
